exposures.name: Ambient Air Pollution (PM2.5)
exposures.definition: PM2.5 (particulate matter with aerodynamic diameter ≤2.5 micrometers) refers to fine inhalable particles that can penetrate deep into the lungs and contribute to respiratory and cardiovascular effects at the population level.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Oxidative stress and inflammatory signaling in airway epithelium; exacerbation of asthma/COPD in cohorts.
Systemic inflammation and endothelial dysfunction associations in population studies.

sensitive_windows.mechanism_rationale: Ongoing lung development and changing activity patterns shape exposure-dose in cohorts.

references.title: EPA Air Quality System (AQS)
Air pollution and health: evidence and mechanisms (review)
references.journal: Journal of the Air & Waste Management Association

exposures.name: Nitrogen Dioxide (NO2)
exposures.definition: Nitrogen dioxide (NO2) is a traffic-related air pollutant often used as a proxy for roadway emissions exposure in population studies.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Airway irritation and oxidative stress associations in cohorts.

references.title: EPA Air Quality System (AQS)

exposures.name: Tobacco Smoking
exposures.definition: Tobacco smoking is an inhaled combustion exposure strongly associated with respiratory and cardiovascular outcomes in population studies.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Oxidative stress, inflammation, and remodeling pathways.
Endothelial dysfunction and atherogenesis pathways.

references.title: The Health Consequences of Smoking—50 Years of Progress
references.journal: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services

exposures.name: Prenatal Tobacco Smoke Exposure
exposures.definition: Maternal smoking or secondhand smoke during pregnancy; studied as a population-level modifier of later respiratory outcomes.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Developmental programming and lung growth context.

sensitive_windows.mechanism_rationale: Fetal lung and immune development windows.

references.title: Prenatal and passive smoke exposure and incidence of asthma and wheeze: systematic review and meta-analysis

exposures.name: Ground-Level Ozone
exposures.definition: Ozone (O3) is a reactive gas formed via photochemical reactions; studied as a population-level modifier of respiratory outcomes.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Oxidative irritation and airway inflammation context.

references.title: EPA Air Quality System (AQS)

exposures.name: Endotoxin (Environmental Microbial Products)
exposures.definition: Endotoxin (LPS) exposure in certain environments; studied as context-dependent modifier of allergic outcomes in population research.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Innate immune receptor activation context (TLR4).

references.title: Endotoxin exposure and allergic disease: complex context-dependent effects

exposures.name: Diet Quality (Dietary Pattern)
exposures.definition: Dietary pattern exposure (e.g., minimally processed vs. highly processed diets) relevant to cardiometabolic outcomes in population studies.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Lipid and glucose homeostasis pathways; inflammatory tone context.

references.title: Healthy diet factsheet and guidance

exposures.name: Physical Inactivity
exposures.definition: Insufficient moderate-to-vigorous physical activity; studied as a population-level modifier of cardiometabolic outcomes.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Insulin sensitivity and vascular health context.

references.title: WHO guidelines on physical activity and sedentary behaviour

exposures.name: Psychosocial Stress
exposures.definition: Stress exposure category (chronic/acute) relevant to neuroendocrine and immune pathways in population studies.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: HPA axis regulation and immune modulation context.

references.title: Psychosocial stress and health outcomes: mechanisms and evidence (review)

exposures.name: Ultraviolet (UV) Radiation
exposures.definition: Ultraviolet radiation exposure; discussed as contextual trigger/modifier in autoimmune literature (population-level).

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Immune modulation and skin injury response context.

references.title: Ultraviolet radiation and autoimmune disease mechanisms: overview (review)

exposures.name: Endocrine Disruptors (Broad Category)
exposures.definition: Broad category of chemicals that may interfere with hormonal signaling; evidence varies by compound and study design.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Hormone receptor signaling and metabolic regulation context (heterogeneous evidence).

references.title: Endocrine disruptors and metabolic outcomes: evidence overview (review)

exposures.name: Microbiome Alteration (Broad Category)
exposures.definition: Changes in gut microbial composition/function studied as population-level modifiers/correlates in metabolic and cancer research.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Barrier-immune interactions and microbial metabolite signaling context.

references.title: Gut microbiome and colorectal cancer: evidence overview (review)

exposures.name: Heavy Metals (Broad Category)
exposures.definition: Heavy metal exposure category (e.g., lead, mercury, cadmium) studied across multiple health outcomes; evidence is compound- and context-specific.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Oxidative stress and organ-specific toxicity mechanisms (varies by metal).

references.title: Heavy metal exposure and health outcomes: overview (review)

exposures.name: Alcohol Use
exposures.definition: Alcohol use is an exposure category studied across multiple health outcomes, including certain cancers and cardiometabolic outcomes, in population research.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Dose- and context-dependent metabolic and inflammatory effects in population studies.

references.title: Alcohol consumption and cancer risk: evidence synthesis (review)

exposures.name: Ionizing Radiation
exposures.definition: Ionizing radiation is a mutagenic exposure category discussed in cancer epidemiology; risk depends on dose, timing, and tissue context.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: DNA strand breaks and repair pathway activation context.

references.title: Ionizing radiation and cancer risk: overview (review)

exposures.name: High Sodium Intake
exposures.definition: Dietary sodium intake is a population-level exposure category studied in relation to blood pressure regulation and cardiovascular outcomes.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Fluid balance and blood pressure regulation pathways.

references.title: Dietary sodium and blood pressure: evidence synthesis (review)

exposures.name: Sleep Disruption
exposures.definition: Sleep disruption (insufficient, irregular, or poor-quality sleep) is studied as a population-level modifier for metabolic and mental health outcomes.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Circadian and neuroinflammation context in population studies.

references.title: Sleep duration and health outcomes: overview of population evidence (review)

exposures.name: Vitamin D Status (Population-Level)
exposures.definition: Vitamin D status (often measured by serum 25(OH)D) is studied as a population-level modifier of immune-related outcomes including multiple sclerosis in some contexts.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Immune regulation context; causal interpretation varies by study design.

references.title: Vitamin D and multiple sclerosis risk: evidence overview (review)

exposures.name: Cannabis Use
exposures.definition: Cannabis use is studied in relation to neuropsychiatric outcomes in some epidemiological and genetic epidemiology contexts; evidence is heterogeneous and confounded.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Neurotransmission context; causal inference is complex.

references.title: Cannabis use and psychosis outcomes: evidence synthesis (review)

exposures.name: Occupational Dust and Fume Exposure
exposures.definition: Occupational dust/fume exposures include inhaled particulates encountered in some workplaces; studied in relation to chronic lung disease risk in population research.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Chronic irritation and inflammation context.

references.title: Occupational exposures and chronic lung disease risk: overview (review)

exposures.name: Infection Burden (Broad Category)
exposures.definition: Broad exposure category representing frequency and severity of infectious exposures in a population; impacts immune activation context.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Innate/adaptive activation context; pathogen-specific effects.

references.title: Infection exposure and immune-mediated disease mechanisms: overview (review)

exposures.name: Household Crowding / Housing Density
exposures.definition: Crowding and housing density are exposure-context variables relevant to respiratory infection transmission patterns in population studies.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Increased exposure opportunity; strongly context-dependent.

references.title: Housing conditions and respiratory infection risk: overview (review)

exposures.name: Heat Stress (Climate-Related)
exposures.definition: Heat stress exposure refers to high ambient temperatures and heat events that can contribute to dehydration and physiological strain in population contexts.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Dehydration and stress response context; vulnerability varies by infrastructure.

references.title: Extreme heat exposure and health outcomes: overview (review)
